title: Start small talk naturally
subtitle: Use light topics and follow-up.
overview: Module: Conversation Control. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: Small talk helps people feel comfortable before deeper conversation.
闲聊能让人在深入对话前感到舒服。
Useful frame: respond, add one idea, ask or repair, and keep the conversation moving.
实用框架：回应、补充一个想法、提问或修复，并让对话继续。
How has your day been so far? I had a quiet morning, but I finally finished something that had been on my list for days.
你今天到目前为止过得怎么样？我早上很安静，但我终于完成了一件在清单上放了好几天的事。

items.en: Small talk helps people feel comfortable before deeper conversation.
items.zh: 闲聊能让人在深入对话前感到舒服。

items.en: Useful frame: respond, add one idea, ask or repair, and keep the conversation moving.
items.zh: 实用框架：回应、补充一个想法、提问或修复，并让对话继续。

items.en: How has your day been so far? I had a quiet morning, but I finally finished something that had been on my list for days.
items.zh: 你今天到目前为止过得怎么样？我早上很安静，但我终于完成了一件在清单上放了好几天的事。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: How has your day been so far? I had a quiet morning, but I finally finished something that had been on my list for days.
lines.zh: 你今天到目前为止过得怎么样？我早上很安静，但我终于完成了一件在清单上放了好几天的事。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
